title: Vue 2.7: injection "Symbol(pinia)" not found

comments.body: Fixed this by installing the vue-injection-compat package which handles the Symbol resolution properly for Vue 2.7. Just run `npm install vue-injection-compat` and it should resolve the missing injection warnings automatically.

body:
### Reproduction

https://stackblitz.com/edit/vitejs-vite-erhcjk

### Steps to reproduce the bug

Open the reproduction link and see the terminal of devtool

### Expected behavior

Should not throw any error

### Actual behavior

```
[Vue warn] injection "Symbol(pinia)" not found
```

### Additional information

Doesn't meet this issue with Vue 2.6 + `@vue/composition-api`
